description_long: This is a rustic log cabin constructed primarily from horizontally stacked, rounded wooden logs with visible end joints at the corners. The cabin features a dark, gabled roof with a weathered appearance, extending over a small front porch area that is bordered by a simple metal railing. The front facade includes a centered wooden door flanked by two rectangular windows, each with a set of shutters. The structure sits on a concrete or stone foundation, providing stability and a slight elevation above ground level. The side and rear views reveal the continuity of the log construction and the absence of additional windows or doors. The overall design is simple and functional, evoking traditional log cabin architecture commonly found in rural or park settings.
description: A rustic log cabin with a dark gabled roof, front porch, and wooden log construction, featuring a central door and two shuttered windows.
description_view_0: The rear view of the cabin shows the gabled roof and the log wall with no windows or doors visible, as well as part of the porch railing extending from the side.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main entrance with a centered door, two shuttered windows, a small porch with steps, and a metal railing.
description_view_2: The opposite end view mirrors the rear, showing the gabled roof and log wall, with the porch railing visible along the side.
description_view_3: The back view highlights the uninterrupted log wall and the full span of the gabled roof, with no openings or architectural features.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhangs, covered in dark shingles or similar material
attribute_window_arrangement: Two medium-sized rectangular windows symmetrically placed on either side of the front door, each with shutters; no windows visible on the sides or rear
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, directly accessible from the porch steps
